warnings: This is the 'มาตรฐานระดับการติดตั้งสุขภัณฑ์' (fixture installation-height reference) elevation strip at the bottom of sheet A-10, printed as a row of small fixture silhouettes each with a mount-height dimension. Values are identical to house 1's equivalent strip (หน้า11 there), cross-confirming the reading.

This file records mount heights only (fixture TYPE definitions are in the sibling _หน้า12_symbol_legend.json — house 2 splits symbol-definition and mount-height-strip into two visually separate table blocks on the same sheet, unlike house 1 which combined both into one table).

M. (mirror) and FD. (floor drain) fixtures appear in the symbol legend but are not shown in this particular height-strip row set (mirror height is typically set relative to the LAV below it rather than an independent floor-datum height, and floor drains are floor-level by definition) — correctly omitted rather than guessed.
